Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_1648f185-f13a-4bb1-a627-f6b4cd2ce1b3","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_1648f185-f13a-4bb1-a627-f6b4cd2ce1b3"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"4ef6a25b-ea35-45d5-b997-1ddeed696c34"},"authorEmail":"rohan.chabukswar@collins.com","authorName":"Rohan Chabukswar","authorOrganization":"Collins Aerospace","description":"glTF is an efficient, extensible, interoperable, API-neutral runtime asset delivery format for the transmission and loading of 3D content. It is a last-mile format to be passed directly to any rendering engine (OpenGL, Microsoft Direct3D, Apple Metal, WebGL, Vulkan, etc.).","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_1648f185-f13a-4bb1-a627-f6b4cd2ce1b3","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_1648f185-f13a-4bb1-a627-f6b4cd2ce1b3"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"e859a025-6f51-4571-91b3-d8924f4ebf80"},"outputFileName":"MATLAB-GLTF.mltbx","outputFolder":"release","summary":"MATLAB-GLTF is a MATLAB class to export 3D graphs and other content into the GL Transmission Format (glTF).","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_1648f185-f13a-4bb1-a627-f6b4cd2ce1b3","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_1648f185-f13a-4bb1-a627-f6b4cd2ce1b3"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"9f4d4862-1537-40b2-990c-6fcc7ffe7cef"},"toolboxName":"MATLAB-GLTF","toolboxVersion":"2.0.0","uniqueId":"e38b0224-12ca-4691-b71e-e91f0121bcc3"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"d8c32154-eb2b-4f9a-8aaf-372d92581098"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"e5577cf8-8a40-421d-b7d2-264d2ceeafd1"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
